name: Palm Siberia
description: Palm Siberia is Knov's apprentice. She only appears in the manga and develops a crush on Gon at one stage. She, on most occasions, has scruffy hair and too much make-up, not to mention a frightening aura caused by stress. However, sometimes she will do herself up and looks stunning.   ~!Palm's power is contained in her blood, which can be used to feed her choice weapon, a small corpse of a merman, in order to track the location of anyone she has seen with her own eyes. Palm is sent in as a personal secretary to Director Bizeff so that she can see secretly see the Chimera Ant King and track his location. However she was found out and turned into a chimera ant. She is currently free from the Chimera's control she is saved by Killua, she is watching Gon's fight with Neferpitou.!~
